New free Google AI Studio and anti-gravity update. So Google AI Studio just changed everything about building apps. You can start right now for free and Google just dropped the biggest AI update to AI Studio they've ever made. You can now type one sentence and get back a real working live web app. Not a prototype, not a demo that breaks when someone clicks it. A real app with user login, real database, real live features. And Google AI Studio also has a free tier. So you can open a browser tab, type what you want, the app gets built, and here's what just happened. Basically, Google wired their anti-gravity coding agent directly into AI Studio, and they plugged Firebase straight into it, too. Firebase is the same back-end system that powers apps used by millions of people worldwide. And as of yesterday, it's sitting inside a free browser tab. The agent builds the front, the agent builds the back, the agent sets up the database, the agent basically does everything, and you just give it a simple command to start going off and coding all from one prompt.
